ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "seriesuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the series of images */,
  "coordX" REAL /* X-coordinate of the image */,
  "coordY" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the image */,
  "coordZ" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the image */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Class of the image (e.g., 0 for normal, 1 for abnormal) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., DICOM, JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "image_annotation_status" TEXT /* Annotation status of the image (e.g., annotated, not annotated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES image_types ("image_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_seriesuid FOREIGN KEY ("seriesuid") REFERENCES series ("seriesuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "seriesuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the series */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the series belongs to */,
  "modality" TEXT /* Modality of the series (e.g., CT, MRI, X-ray) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "series_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the series */,
  "series_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for the series (e.g., CT, MRI, X-ray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_series_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "studyuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the study belongs to */,
  "study_date" TEXT /* Date the study was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_referring_physician" TEXT /* Name of the referring physician */,
  "study_referring_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referring physician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "patient_medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "patient_allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modalities" (
  "modality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modality */,
  "modality_name" TEXT /* Name of the modality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_types" (
  "image_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image type */,
  "image_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the image type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the diagnosis belongs to */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the diagnosis (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  "diagnosis_recommended_treatment" TEXT /* Recommended treatment for the diagnosis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiologists" (
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiologist */,
  "radiologist_name" TEXT /* Name of the radiologist */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the radiologist */,
  "radiologist_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the radiologist */,
  "radiologist_expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the radiologist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radiologist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the annotation belongs to */,
  "radiologist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the radiologist who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation */,
  "annotation_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  "annotation_description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_radiologist_id FOREIGN KEY ("radiologist_id") REFERENCES radiologists ("radiologist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., radiologist, clinician, researcher) */,
  "user_specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the user (e.g., radiologist, clinician, researcher) */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_versions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
